series_metadata.series_description: This includes the support information including historic reports-maintain in Cement & Concrete Section from 1940 to June 2005. The MATERIAL TEST WORKSHEETS contain the hand written notations, internal lab numbers and test results obtained by ODOT technicians during the physical testing of a sample of a Producer/Supplier''s material.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: permanently in shared electronic database (Site Manager)
